query: SELECT id, home_team_name, away_team_name, home_score, away_score, ai_summary IS NOT NULL as hasAiSummary, goals_timeline IS NOT NULL as hasGoalsTimeline, match_statistics IS NOT NULL as hasMatchStats FROM games WHERE status = 'finished' LIMIT 5;
